openFindings.title: REQ-011 cross-runtime delta table is not delivered
openFindings.summary: The parent requires a per-runtime context-load savings table, but the research provides qualitative parity and a future cross-runtime replay plan.

openFindings.title: Canonical root spec-kit docs are absent for the reviewed packet
evidence: directory listing: only spec.md, description.json, graph-metadata.json at packet root
openFindings.summary: The reviewed root lacks plan.md, tasks.md, checklist.md, decision-record.md, and implementation-summary.md, making checklist evidence and completion state unreviewable at the phase root.

openFindings.title: Completed research state still advertises initialized and legacy 021 lineage
openFindings.summary: The config remains initialized while the state log is completed, and the first state line still points at the legacy 021 path after migration to the 006/004 layout.

openFindings.title: Plugin proposal omits explicit manifest and concrete hook registration detail required by REQ-010
openFindings.summary: The proposal lists files, settings, and install steps, but does not specify the manifest artifact or exact hook registration contract named in the parent acceptance criteria.

openFindings.title: Empirical measurement protocol is deferred rather than delivered as fixture prompts plus AI harness
openFindings.summary: The packet defines the measurements to collect in a future replay, but does not provide a concrete fixture prompt set plus executable AI harness artifact as required by REQ-002.

openFindings.title: Status diagnostics are called prompt-safe but do not define a redaction allowlist
openFindings.summary: The proposed status tool reports sanitized errors, but the packet does not define the sanitation contract that prevents prompt-bearing diagnostics from being exposed.

openFindings.title: Default-on rollout remains blocked by adversarial and blind-following follow-up tests
openFindings.summary: The research correctly identifies blind-following and adversarial corpus gaps, but those gaps should stay explicit gates before default-on plugin use.

openFindings.title: Completion language can read stronger than the convergence evidence
openFindings.summary: The parent asks for converged validation, while the final iteration and state log say the loop stopped by max iteration because the strict rolling threshold was not met.

openFindings.title: Migrated packet metadata still exposes legacy 021 trigger phrases
openFindings.summary: Legacy 021 wording remains in the title metadata and derived graph metadata even after migration to the 006/004 path.

verdict.rule: P0 -> FAIL; >=5 P1 -> CONDITIONAL; else PASS
